description: User examines the 'Explore' page content, specifically the 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule' sections.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible with various task cards.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' cards to view different available tasks.
frame_description: The horizontal list of task cards is shifting left and then back right.

description: User moves the cursor towards the filter icon in the top right corner.
frame_description: Cursor moves to the top right of the screen.

description: User clicks the filter icon to open the filter settings.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the filter icon just before the modal appears.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears, overlaying the Explore page.
frame_description: A white modal with filter options (Task Type, Duration, Pay Rate) is now visible.
